full_text:
Zhou Gan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Ganwas born in Guanghan. Noted scholar, backed Tao Qian’s petition to Zhu Jun. Zhou Gan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
